We just heard that a dark money organization is going up with more than a half a million dollars of TV ads attacking me.
Peter, I know we've sent a lot of fundraising emails but this is a critical ask. We've made significant gains in New Hampshire and need to keep our momentum going these last 13 days.
**[Will you chip in right now with a quick donation to help us raise $50,000 for our Rapid Response Fund so we can fight back?](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33137928:scgoZ5yvN:m:1:958431888:3C117C8EEC2D274B2D11ECFBCCF6040B:r)**

-John

name: Rand Paul
subject: What my volunteers say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,
In Iowa, it all comes down to ground game.

It's as simple as that.

While other candidates have wasted precious
dollars on flashy but ineffective TV ad campaigns, my campaign
has focused on what works -- identifying and mobilizing voters.

With only a handful of days left until the
Iowa Caucuses, I truly believe we're set to shock the national
media.

But I'm counting on your support to help us
keep up this feverish pace of phone calls, campus outreach,
door-knocking and campaign stops.

Will you please agree to your most generous
contribution of $250, $100, $50, $25 or even $10 right away?

Patriot, volunteers from around the country
are still pouring into my campaign offices to help make sure even
more voters hear my loud-and-clear message of liberty.

Whenever I get a chance to thank them, they
always tell me why they decided to come.

They say it's because I haven't spent a
political career compromising away our freedom like my opponents.

It's because I haven't put personal ambition
above principle and flip-flopped on core issues for establishment
approval.

It's because I haven't spent a lifetime
buying special treatment from politicians, and using eminent
domain to seize others' property to line my own pockets.

Instead, it's because I've never been afraid
to stand up to the national political establishment and our
national media to fight for the Bill of Rights -- regardless of
the costs.

Today, my poll numbers are rising as more
voters hear my message.

Patriot, I'm in it to win it.

My campaign headquarters are burning up the
phone lines every day, and I'm criss-crossing early voting states
with campaign stop after campaign stop.

This is crunch time.

So please be as generous as you can. Please
agree to your most generous contribution of $250, $100, $50, $25
or even $10 TODAY!

In liberty,
Rand Paul

Or donate another
amount >>

body:
Team Rand,

We are less than a week away from the Iowa
Caucus and exactly two weeks from the New Hampshire primary. We
are getting down to the wire.

I wanted to share with you this special
message from my wife Kelley.

If you are able to come to either Iowa or New
Hampshire, please sign up HERE. Any amount of time you can commit
to this effort will make a significant impact on this race.

If you can't travel to help the campaign with
your time, you still can make a difference by helping sponsor
someone to make the trip for you. Contribute $25 today to help
fund our efforts in these vital primary states.

I appreciate everything you do.

In liberty,

Rand Paul

name: Ben Carson
subject: Fwd: Crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| |

Peter,

I want to make sure you saw General Dees' email from yesterday, which I've forwarded below.

I'm humbled to have the confidence of someone of his stature, and with 5 days until the Iowa Caucuses the urgency of his appeal for you to help us keep our ad running can't be overstated.

To further communicate my readiness to serve as your next Commander-in-Chief, I've released my [full plan for defeating the Islamic State](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33145349:s0onO5yNE:m:1:876315805:0485B056A1460966937F1DDBC5AEB96B:r). Innocent people in America and around the globe are paying the price for our political leaders' inaction -- and it's time for leadership.

As President, I will wage war on radical Islamic terrorists and protect the homeland. I will formally declare war on the Islamic State as part of a comprehensive strategy that focuses the national will, targets this existential threat at its source, and protects the American way of life.
**
[I ask you for your generous support so we can not only communicate my message to Iowa, but target those voters most likely to turn out and support me on February 1st. ](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33145350:s0onO5yNE:m:1:876315805:0485B056A1460966937F1DDBC5AEB96B:r)

[Peter, in just 5 days we have the opportunity to shock the political world, and your support today matters more than ever.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33145350:s0onO5yNE:m:1:876315805:0485B056A1460966937F1DDBC5AEB96B:r)**

Thank you and God Bless America,

Ben

Begin forwarded message:

**From:** Maj. General Bob Dees (U.S. Army, Ret.)
**Subject:** Crisis
**Date:** January 26, 2016
**To:** Ben Carson

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33145350:s0onO5yNE:m:1:876315805:0485B056A1460966937F1DDBC5AEB96B:r)
---

Peter,

6 days. That's all the time we have left between now and the Iowa Caucuses on February 1st.

Everything we've worked for, month after month, will be put to the test and the American people will begin to decide whether or not Dr. Ben Carson becomes President Ben Carson.

As someone who has spent my life serving my country, I would not trust just anyone to be our Commander-in-Chief. While some say Dr. Carson doesn't have the right background for the job, I believe to my core that they are dead wrong.

Not only does Dr. Carson have the right temperament and judgment to serve as President, but he's had to answer more 2 AM phone calls and deal with more life-and-death crises than any other candidate in this race.

**That's a fact, and it's the main theme of our new TV ad that goes on the air today in Iowa. **

[**Right now, I ask you to take 30 seconds to watch it and make a donation to keep it on the air. Whether or not the good people of Iowa get a chance to see it is in your hands.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33145350:s0onO5yNE:m:1:876315805:0485B056A1460966937F1DDBC5AEB96B:r)
**
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33145350:s0onO5yNE:m:1:876315805:0485B056A1460966937F1DDBC5AEB96B:r)
---
**
For decades, tens of thousands of parents across America trusted Dr. Carson enough to put the lives of their children in his hands. They believed, rightly so, that he had the necessary experience, wisdom and judgment.

Just like those tens of thousands of children, I know America will be safe in Dr. Carson's hands.

[**In a dangerous world, this is the message that the people of Iowa must hear and I ask you to urgently watch our ad and make a donation to keep it on the air.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33145350:s0onO5yNE:m:1:876315805:0485B056A1460966937F1DDBC5AEB96B:r)

Thank you for your support.

Respectfully,

Bob Dees
Chairman
Ben Carson for President

That's a fact, and it's the main theme of our new TV ad that goes on the air today in Iowa. For decades, tens of thousands of parents across America trusted Dr. Carson enough to put the lives of their children in his hands. They believed, rightly so, that he had the necessary experience, wisdom and judgment. Just like those tens of thousands of children, I know America will be safe in Dr. Carson's hands. name: Rand Paul
subject: Wrong then, wrong now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

"I think at the end of the day a Ted Cruz
administration would follow a foreign policy that I would be
pretty happy with."

That was Weekly Standard Founder Bill Kristol
giving his "take" on the evolution Senator Ted Cruz has made on
the presidential campaign trail.

If you believe in liberty and limited
government at all, that comment alone should give you pause.

This is a man who's never met a war he didn't
want Americans troops involved in. He still believes the Iraq
War and nation-building there was the right move. In fact, he's
called for more American forces to go back.

He's advocated U.S. ground forces in Syria to
topple Assad for the benefit of radical Islamists. He's called
for intervention in Libya, Kurdistan and elsewhere.

Patriot, during Thursday night's debate, I'm
going to explain exactly why making the sand "glow in the dark"
and doubling down on past foreign policy failures as Senator Ted
Cruz and Bill Kristol want aren't going to solve our problems in
the Middle East.

If you agree, I must be able count on your
immediate contribution of $100, $50, $25 and $10

The overwhelming majority understand that the
Iraq War didn't make us any safer.

And they've seen how toppling secular
dictators in Iraq, Egypt and Libya have actually emboldened
radical Islamists like ISIS.

I believe sending troops into battle is the
most solemn responsibility any President has.

As the Constitution mandates, it must never
be done without a formal declaration from Congress like this
President has done over and over again in.

I believe in Ronald Reagan's axiom "Peace
Through Strength."

Projecting strength abroad starts with
getting our own house in order.

It means securing our porous borders and
ending taxpayer handouts for Syrian refugees, so we can ensure
we're not allowing those into our country who aim to do us harm.

It means tackling our growing $18.9 TRILLION
debt.

A good place to start would be ending foreign
aid to countries who burn our flag or refuse to recognize Israel.

It means protecting the Bill of Rights that
so many Americans sign up for military service to defend.

And instead of rushing into a new war in the
Middle East like Hillary Clinton and members of my own party seem
so intent on, I've said no more American boots on the ground in
the Middle East.

The boots on the ground fighting ISIS must
belong to Arabs. Let's see them standing up and fighting to
protect their own countries

Those like Bill Kristol have been wrong time
and again in the past.

And those in BOTH parties who are arguing for
grand new war in the Middle East are wrong now.

It's time for a new direction.

If you agree, please make your most generous
contribution of $100, $50, $25 or even $10 right away!

In liberty,
Rand Paul

$25 MONEYBOMB >>

$50 MONEYBOMB >>

$75 MONEYBOMB >>

$100 MONEYBOMB >>

Or donate another
amount >>

name: Rick Santorum
subject: It's Back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| Friend,

I know this country matters to you. And I know you have been disappointed by the past several years under this current Administration. I, also, know you are desperately ready for a change. **I know that – deeply, because I feel exactly the same way!** But, if we can assemble 1,000 conservatives who are willing to _InVest in America_ – we can change this! We can put America back on the path to strength and security.
> _An America that invests in families not policies that tear them down!_
> _An America that invests in an immigration policy that puts the American worker first!_
> _And an America that invests, again, in the principles that have made this country great!_
Assembling 1,000 conservatives in a matter of days is a big effort. So, I really need you. **Friend, Will you be one of the willing?** This week, in an effort to win our country back, I launched our _InVest in America_ tour. This tour will take me to over 50 stops in just a matter of days! And, it’s our final push as we head to February 1st – the Iowa Caucus. But, I need your help. We have to finish the job! Our final push includes travel, Townhalls, Tele-Townhalls, and caucus night efforts – all which cost money. Since this is the week when many of the caucus-goers will be making up their minds, our final push matters. And with your help, I will be more in front of Iowans with our message than anyone else. So, I’m asking will you be part of 1,000 conservatives who will stand with me and _InVest in America_? **[Friend, your donation of $30 will propel our message, our efforts and our policies to the White House.](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fsantorum2016%3Fsc%3Dinvest&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=invest_rjs&n=1)** **_Let’s do this together. Last time we shocked the media and the Washington Elites! And we will do it again._ ** As a special thanks, if you _InVest in America_ with a $200 donation or more, I will send you a vintage, limited edition, Made in America sweater vest. That’s right – _the sweater vest is back!_ [Can I count on you to join a coalition of 1,000 conservatives who are willing to invest in America?](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fsantorum2016%3Fsc%3Dinvest&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=invest_rjs&n=2) Together, we will win this fight! God Bless,

Rick P.S. I’m looking forward to seeing the sweater vest on you! Donate $200 and I’d like to send you one! Sizes and quantities are limited, so, honestly, you’ll need to hurry. P.P.S. We’ll attempt to meet size requests, but it’s not guaranteed.

---

**Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help us reclaim the American Dream for hardworking families.**

Santorum for President 2016, PO Box 238, Verona, PA 15147

name: Carrie Aldrich, BernieSanders.com
subject: It's really, really hard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Bernie asked a room full of Iowans -- including me -- to share their stories about living on Social Security and disability benefits this week.
One gal at the event spoke about living on disability, and how she makes only $10,000 a year. She talked about how hard it is to live on nothing -- how hard it is to try to do something nice for your family when you make so little.
**I was in tears when she spoke, because I knew exactly what she meant. So when Bernie asked others to share their stories, I told mine.**
"It's so hard to do anything to pay your bills," I told Bernie and the crowd. "You are ashamed all the time. I worked three, four, five jobs sometimes -- always minimum wage. I have a degree. I'm divorced. I've been waiting for disability to come through, so my parents have to support me. It's just hard."
Last year I only made about $5,000 from Social Security benefits. Folks in my situation often feel ashamed of how we're living and so we want to do better. We want to contribute to our communities, but sometimes our bodies can only do so much.
**Even though I can't afford much, I contributed $15 to Bernie because I've never felt before that a candidate would appreciate a donation from someone like me.**
With the Iowa caucus happening Monday night, there's not much time left to make a contribution that will help Bernie win in Iowa. **[Can you please contribute $3 to Bernie now?](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2dd2/43f17890/4129c656/620e2582/1243402115/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/before-iowa-caucus?refcode=em160127carrie-full")**
**[Donate $3](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2dd2/43f17890/4129c656/620e2582/1243402115/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/before-iowa-caucus?refcode=em160127carrie-full")**
I support Bernie Sanders because he's running for president for the right reason: he genuinely cares about America, and isn't satisfied with the way things are.
The political process often overlooks people like me. That's why I'm so inspired by Bernie. I like that he doesn't have a super PAC and doesn't want that kind of big money. Because he rejects that kind of politics, I know that he's free to care about people's real needs.
Bernie wants to expand Social Security benefits to help regular folks get by. He wants to make a living wage, so that people who work for minimum wage can get out of poverty. When you're not making much, it's hard to keep up with your bills -- and it would give me a sense of pride to be able to pay them on my own.
I know I'm not alone. Since I shared my story yesterday, I've heard from so many people who are stuck in similar situations, but who have the same hopes about what it would mean if Bernie became president.
I had no idea that sharing my story would resonate so much. I wasn't thinking about having an effect across America when I spoke up. I just wanted Bernie to know what it's like to be in my shoes.
Bernie gets it. That's why I want him to win.
When I made my small contribution to Bernie, I wasn't sure it would have much of an impact. But knowing that people all over the country are doing the same thing, contributing whatever they can afford, I know that we have the chance to win.
[**Please contribute $3 to Bernie now so that his campaign can put your contribution to work to help win in Iowa.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2dd2/43f17890/4129c656/620e2582/1243402115/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/before-iowa-caucus?refcode=em160127carrie-full")
Thank you so much for letting me tell my story.
In solidarity,
Carrie Aldrich
Bernie Supporter from Alden, Iowa

**[Contribute](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2dd2/43f17890/4129c656/620e2582/1243402115/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/before-iowa-caucus?refcode=em160127carrie-full")**

_The New York Times_ reported this morning that Bernie Sanders and his advisors are convening to decide whether to air a devastating ad attacking Hillary in the final days before the Iowa caucus. Bernie promised he wouldn't make personal attacks in this campaign -- "I've never run a negative ad in my life and I don't intend to do that," he's said -- but in recent weeks he's gone so far as to compare Hillary to Dick Cheney. clean_body: Hillary and Dick Cheney? | Friend -- The New York Times reported this morning that Bernie Sanders and his advisors are convening to decide whether to air a devastating ad attacking Hillary in the final days before the Iowa caucus. Bernie promised he wouldn't make personal attacks in this campaign -- "I've never run a negative ad in my life and I don't intend to do that," he's said -- but in recent weeks he's gone so far as to compare Hillary to Dick Cheney. From what we hear, this new ad is even darker. We can't let these attacks go unchecked -- we have to fight back, and we have to do it before Iowans caucus on Monday night. We're going to keep running this campaign the right way: going door-to-door to talk to as many Iowans as possible about Hillary’s plans to help their families, from getting tough on Wall Street and health insurance companies to keeping our communities safe from gun violence. We know Hillary is the best candidate to take on the Republicans as well as protect and build on President Obama's progress, but we need to make sure Iowans know it, too -- and we only have five days left. Let's make history in Iowa -- and let's run a campaign we're proud to be a part of. Sisters and Brothers -
Today, with five days to go before Iowa, we have a chance to reach a milestone that will shock the political and media establishment of this country: **reaching three million individual contributions by the Iowa caucus.**
Accomplishing this goal will not only help us win in Iowa, but will demonstrate for everyone that our political revolution is the campaign best positioned to win in November and take our country back from the billionaire class buying up candidates and elections.
[**Make a $3 contribution to our campaign today to help us win in Iowa and reach three million individual, small-dollar contributions before the caucus begins.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2dcb/43f17890/414cf7b0/620e2d88/1628410616/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/before-iowa-caucus?refcode=em160127-3M-full")
A lot of pundits and political establishment types have said our vision for America's future is unrealistic. They say that there's no way to achieve our goal of universal health care, free college tuition for all Americans, overturning Citizens United and more.
But what we were doing on this campaign is proving that when people stand together and demand change, anything is possible. And there will be no better demonstration of that belief than victory in Iowa.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
